quá thất vọng, chất lượng sản phẩm ngày càng đi xuống, hôm đầu được cốc, hôm sau ít hơn đến hôm nay cốc sữa chua ca cao chỉ còn, toàn là đá, có lớp mỏng sữa chua, dúm ca cao dính thành cốc, còn không có vị ngọt của sữa đặc luôn, không bao giờ mua nữa,
giao hàng nhanh, miếng băm chả đều ngon không bị cháy, suất thoải mái no

nhìn ở bên ngoài trông quán khá bé nhưng vào trong thấy cũng không bị bí lắm, có kha khá nhiều bàn nha, quán có tầng và đèn chủ yếu là đèn vàng, trang trí nhẹ nhàng đơn giản với vô vàn tranh treo tường nghệ nghệ mỗi tội chưa có điều hoà nhưng anh chủ bảo tuần sau lắp rồi nên các bạn đến tha hồ mát nhá ở đây có rất nhiều loại kem, yogurt với smoothies và trà sữa, ngoài ra còn có các loại nước ép nữa, giá cả không cao, rất phù hợp túi tiền của các bạn học sinh thỉnh thoảng học xong ra đây tụ tập cũng hay nè trà sữa vị khá ổn, kem hơi nhanh chảy nhưng ăn cũng ok, kem nhuyễn và mịn lắm, mình thấy kem trà xanh ngon nhớ, với cả ở đây có món kem cà phê ăn ngon lớm, kiểu cà phê xong bên trong có kem ý các món mặn ăn cũng dc, nói chung các bạn cứ đến thử xem sao nhớ

quite beautiful place to stay and near everything we need as a customer tourist, next to bidv tower and vietcombank hq, near the lake, ancient town, breakfast is not as i expected, not that quality for hotel quite a shame,
i wish i had this roof in my house,

chilled bar with cheap price in the middle of the famous beer street, if they don tôi have any special event, you ll need to pay only, for the entrance ticket included one drink, its space is quite small but usually crowded, i wonder why there are so many korean guys around whenever i go here, it seems this bar is the favorite place of korean people who visit hanoi, haha,

i love the bubble tea here, it s classy and tasty with several well balanced flavor selections, i usually get mint but sometimes i will get taro or chocolate, i was chided the other day by a comment on a đánh giá i made at another tea place, i had complained about being served iced milk tea in a plastic cup and was told that no one serves tea in a glass, well, this place does and the tea is for tea lovers, so here has been my regular stop,
cà phê ngon
nàng khen ngon là vote ngay

i d be very worried about a coffee shop that stuggles to make something as basic as a black coffee, certainly tastes like they are using instant coffee rather than freshly ground, pity, ground floor stinks of cigarettes would advise using upstairs
butter chicken was not garnished with butter, but with margarine rice is no basmati quality, chicken is very dry,
ga nuong xa bread here is the best ever i had, i can tôi put it here for u guys, it s really great, but green thai tea is normal, not really good, it s a bit bland and cold, thank u
very delicious and hot food, would definetely recommend
have a good time wishing you lost of luck next tiem

excellent american food, the price is acceptable for the quality of food, i was happy to discover they have a brunch thực đơn the only downside is that it can get hot as it s an open space, and there are only a few fans or perhaps it s because i m not used to the high humidity, great for families,

nice atmosphere, the dj was spinning house music on a wednesday night it was food music for having conversations, cocktails are pretty good as its hard ro find a plave that can really do cocktails in vietnam, i would refommend their signature cocktails over the traditional options, there also appears to be a wode selection of wine, had an appetizer of crab fried soring rolls which was tasty as well,

horrible experience, big food poisoning at this resturance in ba trieu, me and my friend went there to have lunch, firstly the waiters came with the thực đơn and ask us to decide so we took pizza à la carte, minutes later we notice that there were set lunch at their restaurant and that they cheated us to get the a la carte full price, so we ask to change and they said, sorry pizza are done already but we did waited more than minutes more so it was also a lie, then just after lunch, we both felt dizzy and stomach not confortable, so we decided to back home and had to cancel all our meetings of the day, then we both vomited and felt bad for days and spend millions of vnđ in hospital becuase of their foods, we have contacted them and what they can do is only saying they are sorry and putting someone on the phone that doesn tôi even speak well english, so the point it, never go to this place anymore and i had to do a đánh giá to prevent people before going there, years living in vietnam and this is the first time it happens to me,

a unique themed restaurant with the concept of three kingdoms, eating there was a good experience, a beautiful looking dragon head hot pot and lavish wooden design, dim sum and kim sa are just super amazing, highly recommended to go and try out, a unique concept of self picking the meat embedded in sticks and a vast range of mushrooms, hand made noodle and sea food to choose from, give it a try guys, cheers

service and food was good, thực đơn had partial translation, waiter knew basic english which was good, he suggested a couple of dish instead we opted out for the lau bo being a hot pot fan, the soup broth was really clean, reminded me of the sweet sour soup with hints of tangyness and sweetness of pineapple and tomato, the drinks thực đơn wasnt listed with the main menu, theres two floors to the restaurant with half of the top floor exposed and overlooks the street, there was also portable airconditioning and fan unit to try keep cool, there was a degree of cleanliness aswell,

the packaging for drinks needs to be improved, a coffee on the go cup is not ideal, and please do not add plastic straws, especially if the customer requests, i have ordered here several times, each time i add a note to not include plastic straws, each time they deliver with plastic straws,
lovely ambiance we got at home moc today, food was perfect and staff are very nice and helpfull, surely, i will recommend it to my friends and i myself will come back regularly,

nice place to have a light drinks with friends you can find a good corner to chit chat and stay away from people eyes foods here also very nice you must try green lobster pasta don tôi đặt món too much you can ask them to make one portion and share if you have only two person easy to park your car, that is one reason i love this place since hanoi is always hard to find a car park

my friend and i ventured out for brekkie brunch and were certainly not disappointed beautiful veggie bun rien and probably the best summer rolls i ve had in the last five months in vietnam, very nice iced tea too we had the kumquat one, delish, check it out
hide deep in back of alley, but customers are keep coming in, i tried banh duc, i really like their soup, also, tried banh da, tasty too, i definitely come here again,
mint cà phê based in hanoi close to the cathedral st joseph, it is very cosy but what i like the most is all the good cocktails made by professionnal bartender, i recommend it for sure
i ll miss this one i hope they ll have this in the philippines when i go back to i ll sure to go back for you
good experience here in ha noi, i love fresh mango juice no sugar, i ll be back next time, thank you
